summary: First full test of Career Evolution Map CMS. Backend (13/13 pytest) and frontend (all critical flows) PASS. Public site loads, admin login works, wrong creds show error, /admin redirects when unauth, all 7 tabs render, save+persistence works end-to-end (verified via detailUrl -> '了解更多' link appearing on public site), logout works. No blocking issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py get_current_user still checks cookies first even though frontend uses Bearer tokens - harmless but dead-code branch since login endpoint doesn't set cookies.
CORS_ORIGINS is '*' while allow_credentials=True - browsers reject this combo. Currently unused (no cookies) but should be tightened before adding cookie-based auth.
Upload endpoint returns base64 data URLs - fine for MVP but will bloat MongoDB document; consider file storage/GridFS for production.
No content field validation on PUT /api/content (extra='allow'), so an admin could accidentally break the schema; not blocking but noteworthy.
seed_data_creation: None. Test data was created and then restored to defaults via API cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers login/me/protected/upload/content-update-persistence. Playwright flow verified: landing sections, /admin auth guard, wrong-cred error, login success, 7 tabs, career evolution add/remove/URL controls, detailUrl -> '了解更多' link on public site, logout. HeroEditor tagline field selector by label was not resolved via get_by_label - if further testing needs it, inspect SectionEditors.jsx for the actual label wiring (labels may not be linked to inputs via htmlFor).
